example-cli

example-cli is a lightweight command-line application used
to demonstrate the custom help renderer, including coloured
sections, wrapped prose, and flags and commands organised
into named groups.

USAGE
  example-cli <command> [flags]

EXAMPLES
  example-cli init
  example-cli sync origin main --remote https://vault.example.org

ITEM COMMANDS
  add          Add an item to the vault and write the
               updated contents to disk
  init         Initialize a new vault in the current
               directory

REMOTE COMMANDS
  sync         Synchronize the vault with a remote

ADDITIONAL COMMANDS
  completion   Generate the autocompletion script for the
               specified shell

Use example-cli [command] --help for more information about
a command.
